title: dolichos faba-nigrita
intro: Dolichos faba-nigrita, also known as black-blotched horse gram, is a type of legume that belongs to the Dolichos genus, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dolichos faba-nigrita include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a food source in some parts of Africa.
